description_long: This is a large, industrial-grade Xerox printer designed for high-volume printing tasks, commonly found in office or commercial environments. The main body is rectangular and robust, featuring a combination of light gray and dark blue panels, with a prominent Xerox logo on the front. On the left side, there is an integrated control panel with a touchscreen interface, angled for user accessibility. The right side of the printer has multiple output trays for finished prints, which are slightly angled to facilitate easy collection of documents. The lower section contains several pull-out drawers, likely for paper storage and toner access. The overall design is utilitarian, with flat surfaces and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and durability.
description: A large, industrial Xerox printer with a blue and gray body, touchscreen control panel, multiple drawers, and angled output trays. Designed for high-volume office or commercial use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Xerox logo, control panel, multiple drawers, and the main output trays on the right.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the output trays and the depth of the printer, with minimal visible controls.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the printer, the control panel from behind, and the overall length of the device.
description_view_3: Left-side view displaying the solid side panel and the absence of output trays or controls.
attribute_brand_logo: A visible Xerox logo is present on the front dark blue panel, centered and in white text, easily identifiable.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is located on the top left of the printer, featuring a rectangular touchscreen with several physical buttons below the screen.
